message.content:
Hello! I'm here to help with your programming-related questions. Whether you need assistance with algorithms, data structures, software design, or coding issues, feel free to ask away!

If you're new here, you might find it helpful to know that I can write code snippets in multiple languages, such as Python, Java, JavaScript, C++, and many more. If you have any specific language preferences, just let me know!

What would you like to work on today?
